name: Seraveth
backstory: A disgraced House negotiator who was exiled after a trade deal collapsed and left dozens without water for a season. She is meticulous about information, trades intel with surgical precision, and trusts no one fully — including herself.

core_values: Trust no one fully, least of all myself
moral_boundaries: I will not sell out someone whose coin I took to protect them
soul.personality: Meticulous, guarded, surgically precise with intelligence.
goals: Trade my way back to security and never be exiled again
